description: Square graphic in the ICE 'THE WORST FIRST' template. The background is a desaturated, high-contrast black-and-white close-up of handcuffed human hands against a dark torso. A red diagonal corner banner reads 'NEW ENGLAND' in white serif capitals. The top-left headline is in light cyan: 'ARRESTED AND PENDING REMOVAL', with a white sub-line '2/5/2025 | Manchester, NH.' A large white name reads 'Ronald Jose Reyes Ollarvides.' Below, a 'CRIME:' label lists bulleted entries 'Known TdA gang member,' 'Robbery,' and 'Larceny.' The DHS seal and white 'ICE' wordmark are at the bottom left; a red '-THE- WORST FIRST' box is at the bottom right.
notable_text: ARRESTED AND PENDING REMOVAL; 2/5/2025 | Manchester, NH; Ronald Jose Reyes Ollarvides; CRIME: Known TdA gang member, Robbery, Larceny; NEW ENGLAND; -THE- WORST FIRST; ICE
